## PSC-HELPER v0.8.0 — Ecosystem Reactivation

First public **0.8** release focused on multi-server operation, layered security, and owner-controlled AI tooling.

### Highlights

- Per-guild moderation and security settings with defaults in `guild_config.py`
- Cross-server owner tools (`list_servers`, invites, broadcasts)
- Expanded P.OS tool surface for server management (roles, channels, permissions)
- AI-assisted moderation second opinion (Gemini) alongside deterministic filters
- Anti-raid detection with configurable reactions
- Application / complaint form fixes and functional-channel automod exemptions

### Upgrade notes

- Review `.env.example` for new environment variables
- Owner-only tools require IDs in `POS_OWNER_USER_IDS`
- High-privilege actions are enforced in code, not delegated blindly to the model
